svg.title: Mermaid activations
svg.desc: Demonstrates explicit Mermaid activation control and activation shortcuts. From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with: node sequencer.js --mermaid -i test/mermaid-features/05-activations/input.mmd -o -f -t test/mermaid-features/05-activations
svg.text: Demonstrates explicit Mermaid activation control and activation shortcuts.
From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with:
Note beside explicit activate [Mermaid: Note right of Service: Note beside explicit activate]

text.font-family: Liberation Mono, Courier New, Courier, monospace

svg.text: 1. Service already active [Mermaid context: activate Service]
Note after explicit deactivate [Mermaid: Note over Service: Note after explicit deactivate]

text.font-family: Liberation Mono, Courier New, Courier, monospace
Liberation Mono, Courier New, Courier, monospace

svg.text: Note before explicit DB activation [Mermaid: Note over DB: Note before explicit DB activation]

text.font-family: Liberation Mono, Courier New, Courier, monospace

svg.text: 4. DB remains active [Mermaid context: activate DB]
Note before explicit DB deactivation [Mermaid: Note left of DB: Note before explicit DB deactivation]
